'''MD-1''' was an [[MD-1 medical droid]] assigned to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]. Its service carried over once the ship's crew [[Mutiny on the Far Orbit|mutined]] and took over control of the vessel. MD-1 was charged with overseeing the medical lab to handle pathological investigations, occasionally assisted by [[MD-2]] and [[MD-3]].<ref name="FOP" />
